metadata.description: A small marketplace of Claude Code plugins by StanMarek.

plugins.name: claude-faaah
plugins.description: Plays the iconic FAAAH sound on every prompt submit.

plugins.name: pastel-statusline
plugins.description: Three-line pastel-colored statusline showing identity, workspace, and resource info.

plugins.name: hostile-cto
